pending.body: src/contexts/workflow_composition/final_review.rs:2437-2445 makes every `FailureClass::DomainValidationFailure` terminal before the new transient classifier is consulted. That breaks the exact codex path this bead was meant to fix: `src/adapters/process_backend.rs:2679-2705` explicitly treats `ERROR: stream disconnected before completion` / `You can retry your request...` carried as `DomainValidationFailure` as transient, but the final-review loop will still fail them immediately instead of retrying. The new no-retry test at src/contexts/workflow_composition/final_review.rs:4494-4587 also hard-codes the wrong rule by asserting that all domain-validation failures are non-retryable, so a 1-reviewer panel can still fail on the reproduced codex disconnect path.

status_summary: running: final review restart round 4 -> Plan and Implement
